prompt: Generate a Textual Graphics meme, employing the reference image's composition of a character interacting with a screen. Overlay meme text onto the image or the screen content.
prompt_refined: Generate a Textual Graphics meme using the composition from image 1. The image features a soldier in a military vehicle, positioned near a monitor on the left. Overlay prominent, bold meme text onto the blank screen of this monitor. Alternatively, place the meme text as a general overlay on the image, ensuring it does not obscure the soldier's face or the monitor.
